'''Farboon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that appeared green-blue from [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. It was the site where [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] pilot, rescued [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mordon (Human)|Mordon]]'s shuttle from a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Skirmish near Farboon|attack]] of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] fighters.

{{Planet-stub}}
